title: eragrostis mokensis
intro: Eragrostis mokensis is a species of grass native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Eragrostis mokensis has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis mokensis include infusion and decoction, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
